enum_values.name: Abort
enum_values.summary: The migration should not proceed and the file open operation should be aborted. This can be used to indicate that a version of file that is no longer supported and no migration path is provided.

enum_values.name: Migrate
enum_values.summary: File migration should proceed to migrate the older file version to a newer one.

enum_values.name: Retain
enum_values.summary: The file version is up-to-date and the file can be used as-is without migration.
